name: Rapalogs Coverage Repair for June 11, 2026
summary: Coverage-repair bundle staging Rapalogs source, study, finding, registry-watch, review, seminal-anchor, and outlook-support records. The proposed outlook refresh moves the track to low-confidence human_functional_benefit with mixed momentum because human functional endpoints have been tested, but the evidence remains branch-specific, mixed, and short of durable disease, frailty, mortality, or broad healthy-aging benefit.

scope.question: Which known source-completeness gaps for Rapalogs need repair, and does resolving them change the coverage verdict or public boundaries?

proposed_changes.summary: Add the PEARL one-year rapamycin trial source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair result-bearing human safety and healthspan coverage for Rapalogs.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the PEARL human rapamycin healthspan study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent PEARL as a completed randomized human trial with safety, biomarker, and healthspan endpoints.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the PEARL mixed safety and healthspan finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Surface PEARL's safety signal, null primary endpoint, and limited secondary/subgroup positives without overstating durable geroprotection.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Harrison 2009 late-life rapamycin mouse lifespan source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair the missing seminal preclinical lifespan anchor for Rapalogs.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the ITP mouse lifespan study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent the canonical mammalian lifespan experiment that anchors Rapalogs biologic rationale.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the late-life rapamycin mouse lifespan finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Make the animal lifespan anchor visible while caveating translation to humans.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the 2025 rapamycin vertebrate lifespan meta-analysis source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair recent-review and animal-lifespan triangulation.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the vertebrate lifespan meta-analysis study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent recent synthesis as review-level context rather than a human efficacy result.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the meta-analysis lifespan boundary finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Use the review to strengthen preclinical coverage while preserving heterogeneity, bias, and human-translation limits.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Nature Aging mTOR inhibitors review source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair recent review, safety, translation, and taxonomy-boundary coverage.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the mTOR inhibitors aging review study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent review-level synthesis across animal longevity, human trials, and translational barriers.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the mTOR inhibitor translation-boundary finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Make safety, dose, selectivity, endpoint, and taxonomy constraints visible in the Rapalogs support map.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the REVERSE rapamycin/ProLon registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair active no-results registry coverage for a rapamycin methylation-age study.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the REVERSE active no-results study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Track the aging-labeled rapamycin and fasting-mimicking-diet combination trial while preserving attribution caveats.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the REVERSE active no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Expose the methylation-age and combination-intervention watch item without upgrading efficacy.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Everolimus Aging Study registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair active human geroprotection registry coverage for everolimus.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Everolimus Aging geroprotection registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Track metabolic, cardiac, cognitive, molecular, and safety endpoints in an active older-adult trial.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Everolimus Aging active no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Make the active no-results status visible without treating enrollment as evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the RESTOR mTORi older-adults registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair rapamycin and everolimus PK/PD registry coverage.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the RESTOR older-adult rapamycin/everolimus PK/PD study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Track dose timing, tissue target engagement, and safety prerequisites for stronger claims.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the RESTOR recruiting no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Expose the recruiting PK/PD and target-engagement watch item.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Rapa/cMRI older-adults registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair completed no-results registry coverage for older-adult cardiac-function endpoints.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the completed Rapa/cMRI older-adult study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Track the small completed trial with no posted functional cardiac MRI results.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the completed no-results Rapa/cMRI finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent completed no-results status as limiting watch context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the RAP PAC rapalog pharmacology registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair dose, safety, pharmacology, and mTOR target-engagement registry coverage.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the RAP PAC pharmacology study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Track weekly sirolimus and everolimus dose, toxicity, PK, and tissue target-engagement context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the RAP PAC recruiting no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Expose the recruiting dose and safety watch item without treating it as efficacy evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add finding-level watch context for the existing sirolimus older-adults registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The public outlook already cites NCT05237687, but the support map needs a no-results finding rather than only an activity item.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Rapalogs track and nutrient-sensing hallmark mapping to the oral rapamycin feasibility study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Normalize direct systemic rapamycin evidence across Senomorphics and Rapalogs.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Rapalogs support mapping to the oral rapamycin feasibility finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Use the study as safety and limiting functional context for Rapalogs.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Rapalogs track and nutrient-sensing hallmark mapping to the topical rapamycin skin study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Normalize direct rapamycin biomarker context while preserving local skin and senomorphic boundaries.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Rapalogs support mapping to the topical rapamycin p16 finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Use the finding as local human biomarker context without implying systemic rapalog benefit.

proposed_changes.summary: Refresh the Rapalogs outlook support map and boundary language.
proposed_changes.rationale: Move from a thin activity-only public map to a source-backed low-confidence human_functional_benefit read with explicit animal, human, limiting, safety, registry, and taxonomy support.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Replace the activity-only moderate human_biomarker_signal outlook with a source-backed low-confidence human_functional_benefit read. The stage changes because human functional endpoints have been tested; confidence lowers because PEARL is mixed, RTB101 has a phase 3 miss, and many registries remain no-results.

next_actions: Run source-fidelity, interpretation/forecast, taxonomy-mapping, and safety-limitations review for the staged Rapalogs coverage-repair bundle.
If approved and published, return Rapalogs to ordinary surveillance with watch items for NCT05237687, NCT07354620, NCT05835999, NCT06658093, NCT04742777, NCT05949658, NCT06789900, and NCT07191353.
